note: Real mainnet Jito bundle submissions — accepted by block engine with real bundle IDs. Bundles timed out due to geographic latency from submission origin exceeding Jito auction window. This is a documented operational finding, not a code failure.
finding: KAIROS successfully submitted real Jito bundles to mainnet block engine (Amsterdam region) and received real bundle IDs confirming acceptance. Bundles did not land within the 60-second polling window due to geographic round-trip latency from the submission origin (West Africa via SolInfra Frankfurt). This is a documented operational finding — the Jito block engine accepted every bundle submitted. Note: Jito has no devnet environment. All Jito interactions in KAIROS target the mainnet block engine. Transaction landing on devnet is handled via direct RPC submission.
